title: waitzia citrina
intro: Waitzia citrina, also known as the Golden Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Waitzia citrina is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
